[[File:Vesta's spear detail.png|150px|left]]
'''Vesta's spear''' is a two-handed weapon requiring 78 [[Attack]] to wield. It is part of [[Vesta's equipment]], a set of [[Ancient Warriors' equipment]].

On permanent [[Deadman Mode]] worlds, it is dropped by any monster found in the [[Wilderness]] as part of a [[Deadman Mode#Global loot table|global loot table]], the chance being relative to the combat level of the monster. It can also be obtained from looting [[Deadman's chest (scenery)|Deadman's chests]] and as a drop from [[breach monster]]s in [[Deadman: Annihilation]].

The spear is a [[corpbane weapon]] and does full damage to the [[Corporeal Beast]] when on the [[stab]] attack style.

==Special attack==
[[File:Spear Wall.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing Vesta's spear's special attack.]]
Vesta's spear has a [[special attack]], ''Spear Wall'', that consumes 50% of the player's [[special attack energy]] and damages up to 16 targets within 8 tiles surrounding the player (one if the player is outside a [[multicombat area]]).

In addition, the user becomes immune to melee attacks for 8 ticks (4.8 seconds).
